global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and bold text promoting a weekend escape.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for a weekend getaway.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the top section of the ad, providing a vibrant backdrop.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, are centered in the ad, rendered in a lighter blue shade.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: A rectangular shape is positioned slightly above the center, featuring a subtle outline.

elements.label: Escape this weekend
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Escape this weekend' is prominently displayed at the bottom, conveying the main message.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Special fares today €29.99 Start now

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: The 'CloudRoute' logo appears in a smaller font at the top left, colored white against the blue background.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small yellow circular badge in the top right corner reads 'SALE', adding urgency to the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, special fares, weekend escape
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the bottom, the main subject is centered, and the logo is at the top left with the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Escape this weekend, Special fares today, €29.99, Start now, CloudRoute, SALE
